patch.value:
GitHub: https://github.com/unbraind/pm-cli/issues/468

## Problem
During the 2026-07-06 package dependency sweep, package instructions referenced the pm SDK, but `npm view @unbrained/pm-sdk` returns 404 while the CLI resolves as `@unbrained/pm-cli@2026.7.6`. Agents invent non-existent package coordinates.

## Fix options
- Document the canonical SDK import path (currently exported from @unbrained/pm-cli) in contracts/help + package-author docs; or
- publish/alias @unbrained/pm-sdk if that is the intended coordinate; and
- add a short "latest CLI/SDK package coordinates" section for agents.

Feeds the SDK-first epic pm-usfg: the universal-tool story (pm-w89s, pm-cbwg) needs unambiguous SDK coordinates. Related: pm-ds3b (SDK reference documentation).
GH-468: clarify or publish the pm SDK npm package coordinates (@unbrained/pm-sdk is 404)

Dogfood GH-468: package-author instructions say 'latest pm CLI and pm SDK' but npm view @unbrained/pm-sdk returns 404 — authors cannot tell whether the SDK is embedded in @unbrained/pm-cli, published elsewhere, or unpublished. Duplicate check: searched publish SDK npm package — pm-ds3b covers SDK reference docs, no item covers the package-coordinates decision.

Canonical SDK import/package coordinates documented in pm contracts/help output and package-author docs; either @unbrained/pm-sdk is published/aliased or docs state explicitly the SDK ships inside @unbrained/pm-cli; a 'latest CLI/SDK package coordinates' section exists for agents
